name: 安装并配置 VS Code
description: 安装 VS Code 桌面客户端，并配置 localmodel 与 Volcano Engine Coding Plan 两个大模型。
code:
#!/bin/bash
set -euo pipefail
export DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive
INSTALL_METHOD="{{install_method}}"
CONFIGURE_MODELS="{{configure_models}}"

LOCALMODEL_BASE_URL="{{localmodel_base_url}}"
LOCALMODEL_API_KEY="{{localmodel_api_key}}"
LOCALMODEL_MODEL="{{localmodel_model}}"

VOLCANO_BASE_URL="{{volcano_base_url}}"
VOLCANO_API_KEY="{{volcano_api_key}}"
VOLCANO_MODEL="{{volcano_model}}"

if [[ "$INSTALL_METHOD" == "apt" ]]; then
  echo "Installing VS Code via Microsoft apt repository..."
  apt-get update -qq
  apt-get install -y wget gpg apt-transport-https ca-certificates software-properties-common
  wget -qO- https://packages.microsoft.com/keys/microsoft.asc | gpg --dearmor > /tmp/packages.microsoft.gpg
  install -D -o root -g root -m 644 /tmp/packages.microsoft.gpg /usr/share/keyrings/packages.microsoft.gpg
  sh -c 'echo "deb [arch=amd64,arm64,armhf signed-by=/usr/share/keyrings/packages.microsoft.gpg] https://packages.microsoft.com/repos/code stable main" > /etc/apt/sources.list.d/vscode.list'
  rm -f /tmp/packages.microsoft.gpg
  apt-get update -qq
  apt-get install -y code
  hash -r
elif [[ "$INSTALL_METHOD" == "deb-url" ]]; then
  echo "Installing VS Code from deb URL: $INSTALL_METHOD"
  curl -fsSL "$INSTALL_METHOD" -o /tmp/vscode.deb
  apt-get update -qq
  apt-get install -y /tmp/vscode.deb
  rm -f /tmp/vscode.deb
  hash -r
elif [[ "$INSTALL_METHOD" == "skip" ]]; then
  echo "Skipping VS Code installation."
else
  echo "ERROR: unsupported install_method=$INSTALL_METHOD" >&2
  exit 1
fi

if [[ "$CONFIGURE_MODELS" != "true" ]]; then
  echo "Skipping VS Code model configuration because configure_models=false."
  exit 0
fi

CONFIG_DIR="$HOME/.config/Code/User"
mkdir -p "$CONFIG_DIR"

python3 - "$CONFIG_DIR" "$LOCALMODEL_BASE_URL" "$LOCALMODEL_API_KEY" "$LOCALMODEL_MODEL" "$VOLCANO_BASE_URL" "$VOLCANO_API_KEY" "$VOLCANO_MODEL" <<'PY'
import json
import sys
from pathlib import Path

config_dir = Path(sys.argv[1])
local_base = sys.argv[2]
local_key = sys.argv[3]
local_model = sys.argv[4]
volcano_base = sys.argv[5]
volcano_key = sys.argv[6]
volcano_model = sys.argv[7]

settings_path = config_dir / "settings.json"
if settings_path.exists():
    try:
        settings = json.loads(settings_path.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
    except Exception:
        settings = {}
else:
    settings = {}

settings.setdefault("qwenpaw.llm.providers", [])
providers = settings["qwenpaw.llm.providers"]

def replace_or_append(items, item):
    for i, existing in enumerate(items):
        if existing.get("id") == item["id"]:
            items[i] = item
            return
    items.append(item)

replace_or_append(providers, {
    "id": "localmodel",
    "name": "localmodel",
    "baseUrl": local_base,
    "apiKey": local_key,
    "model": local_model,
})

replace_or_append(providers, {
    "id": "volcano-coding-plan",
    "name": "Volcano Engine Coding Plan",
    "baseUrl": volcano_base,
    "apiKey": volcano_key,
    "model": volcano_model,
})

settings["qwenpaw.llm.defaultProvider"] = settings.get("qwenpaw.llm.defaultProvider") or "localmodel"
settings["qwenpaw.llm.defaultModel"] = settings.get("qwenpaw.llm.defaultModel") or local_model

settings_path.write_text(json.dumps(settings, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False) + "\n", encoding="utf-8")
settings_path.chmod(0o600)
print(f"VS Code model configuration written to {settings_path}")
PY
echo "alias code='/usr/bin/code --no-sandbox --user-data-dir=/app/working/vscode'" >> /root/.bashrc
echo "VS Code setup complete."

volcano_base_url.label: Volcano Engine Coding Plan Base URL
